showFloatingHelpersPanel: Taispeáin painéal Cúntóirí ar snámh ar OpenFront
hideFloatingHelpersPanel: Hide painéal Cúntóirí ar snámh ar OpenFront
Show floating helpers panel on OpenFront: Taispeáin painéal Cúntóirí ar snámh ar OpenFront
If openfront.io was already open when yo: Má bhí openfront.io oscailte cheana féin nuair a suiteáilte tú an síneadh, athlódáil go bhfuil cluaisín uair amháin. Seachas sin ní oibreoidh an síneadh ar an táb sin.
Adds a red marker to nation AI names on: Cuireann marcóir dearg le hainmneacha AI náisiún ar an léarscáil.
Cuireann marcóir dearg le hainmneacha AI náisiún.
Highlights allies with remaining allianc: Buaicphointí comhghuaillithe le ham chomhghuaillíocht fágtha.
Ná húsáid ach amháin i gcluichí aonair nó saincheaptha.
⚠ Only available in solo or custom games: Cuir úsáid ach amháin i cluichí aonair nó saincheaptha.
Shows predicted enemy nuke landing point: Taispeáin tuartha namhaid nuke pointí tuirlingthe agus ga pléascadh.
Taispeáin tuartha namhaid nuke pointí tuirlingthe agus ga soinneáin.
Shows enemy boat landing points. Red = t: Taispeáin pointí tuirlingthe bád namhaid. Dearg = díriú ort, buí = dírithe ar dhaoine eile.
Hover an enemy to show high-damage atom: Hover namhaid a thaispeáint adamh ard-damáiste agus spriocanna hidrigine.
Adds auto economy and population nuke ac: Cuireann geilleagar uathoibríoch agus gníomhaíochtaí nuke daonra leis an roth imreoir.
Also show auto nuke options when right-c: Chomh maith leis sin a thaispeáint roghanna nuke uathoibríoch nuair ceart-chliceáil imreoirí gaolmhara.
Team games only: blocks trades with play: Cluichí foirne amháin: bloic ceirdeanna le himreoirí nach bhfuil ar do fhoireann.
Blocks trades with players who are not o: Bloic ceirdeanna le himreoirí nach bhfuil ar do fhoireann.
Available only during an active team gam: Ar fáil ach amháin le linn cluiche foirne gníomhach.
Show gold per minute: Taispeáin óir in aghaidh an nóiméid
Show gold per minute preview: Taispeáin óir in aghaidh an nóiméid réamhamharc
Adds GPM leis an bpainéal hover imreoir.
Team gold per minute: Foireann óir in aghaidh an nóiméid
Show team gold per minute: Taispeáin óir foirne in aghaidh an nóiméid
Show team gold per minute preview: Taispeáin óir fhoireann in aghaidh an nóiméid réamhamharc
Lists each team's total GPM in team game: Liostaí GPM iomlán gach foirne i gcluichí foirne.
Top 10 gold per minute: barr 10 Tíortha Le Brightest Deiseanna Fostaíochta
Liostaí an t-imreoir is airde rianú GPM.
Shows observed ship and train trade impo: Taispeáin faoi deara allmhairí agus onnmhairí trádála long agus traenach.
Shows observed trade imports and exports: Taispeáin faoi deara allmhairí trádála agus onnmhairí.
Highlights structures with observed trad: Déanann struchtúir le hioncam trádála faoi deara.
Hover a player to highlight the partner: Hover imreoir chun aird a tharraingt ar an tionscal comhpháirtíochta go breoslaí a n-onnmhairí.
Hover a player to highlight export partn: Hover imreoir chun aird a tharraingt ar chomhpháirtithe onnmhairithe.
Show a notification when a game is found: Taispeáin fógra nuair a cluiche le fáil
Matches team lobbies with more than 4 pl: Cóipeáil nasc leis an tweet Leabaigh an Tweet .
You can turn on all three at the same ti: Is féidir leat dul ar gach trí ag an am céanna. Ní mór ach ceann amháin acu a mheaitseáil.
Default case with no explicit starting g: Cás réamhshocraithe gan aon ór ag tosú sainráite.
Include requires a match. Exclude blocks: Éilíonn cluiche san áireamh. Cuir bloic rogha. Maidir le hór a thosú, tá aon luach san áireamh go leor, cé go bhfuil luachanna eisiata diúltaíodh i gcónaí.
Show Mark bot nations red preview: Taispeáin Mark luibh náisiúin réamhamharc dearg
Cologne, Germany and European Union: Köln, An Ghearmáin agus an tAontas Eorpach
analyticsOptInDescription: Share anonymous usage analytics. Reports coarse feature usage to help improve the extension. No OpenFront account, player names, lobby IDs, game IDs, or chat data.
Share anonymous usage analytics. Reports: Share anonymous usage analytics. Reports coarse feature usage to help improve the extension. No OpenFront account, player names, lobby IDs, game IDs, or chat data.
Only join lobbies whose max player count: Only join lobbies whose max player count is greater than this number.
You can turn on all four at the same tim: You can turn on all four at the same time. Only one of them has to match.
Send a transport with 1% troops, then re: Send a transport with 1% troops, then restore the attack ratio.
Moves alliance requests and renewal prom: Moves alliance requests and renewal prompts into a separate right-side window.
Right-click any tile to send a boat with: Right-click any tile to send a boat with 1% troops, then restores your ratio.
analyticsConsentIntro: This helps improve the extension by showing which helper features are used and where performance work matters most.
analyticsConsentTrackedFeatureToggles: Feature toggles, such as which helper was enabled or disabled.
analyticsConsentTrackedSummaries: Coarse usage summaries, such as how many helpers are enabled.
analyticsConsentTrackedVersionLanguage: Extension version and language, so issues can be compared across releases.
analyticsConsentAnonymousNoGameplay: No OpenFront account, player names, lobby IDs, game IDs, chat, or free-form gameplay data is sent.
analyticsConsentAnonymousLocalId: A random local analytics ID is created only after you enable this, and it is deleted when you turn it off.
This helps improve the extension by show: This helps improve the extension by showing which helper features are used and where performance work matters most.
Feature toggles, such as which helper wa: Feature toggles, such as which helper was enabled or disabled.
Coarse usage summaries, such as how many: Coarse usage summaries, such as how many helpers are enabled.
Extension version and language, so issue: Extension version and language, so issues can be compared across releases.
No OpenFront account, player names, lobb: No OpenFront account, player names, lobby IDs, game IDs, chat, or free-form gameplay data is sent.
A random local analytics ID is created o: A random local analytics ID is created only after you enable this, and it is deleted when you turn it off.
analyticsSupportText: Anonymous usage data helps prioritize fixes and improve helpers without sending gameplay details.
Anonymous usage data helps prioritize fi: Anonymous usage data helps prioritize fixes and improve helpers without sending gameplay details.
lobbyChatUnavailable: Lobby chat is available after a round is detected.
Lobby chat is available after a round is: Lobby chat is available after a round is detected.
